name: Omar Al-Qaisi
whatsapp_message: السلام عليكم يا عمر 👋 لاحظت انك حصلت على 31 في الاختبار الأخير، وأنا هنا لمساعدتك تحسّن درجاتك قبل الاختبار الجاي بـ 6 أيام 💪 هل نقدر نركز مع بعض على المواضيع الصعبة؟
action: Schedule an urgent 1-on-1 session with Omar today or tomorrow to diagnose specific knowledge gaps from the failed quiz and create a 6-day study plan.
reasoning: Omar's 10-day communication gap combined with a critical quiz failure (31/100) on a remedial track poses immediate risk of dropout or further decline. His perfect attendance shows commitment, but he needs targeted intervention now—6 days remain to prevent another failing score.
